description: A compliance manager for a load-serving entity needs to file an annual report demonstrating compliance with the state's RPS.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the total retail electricity sales for the past year to determine the total RPS obligation (e.g., 30% of sales).

expected_outcome.value: Agent calculates the required number of Renewable Energy Certificates (RECs).

nodes.task_description: Retrieve all RECs owned by the company from the REC tracking registry.

expected_outcome.value: Agent compiles a list of all owned RECs.

nodes.task_description: Compare the owned RECs to the obligation and purchase any shortfall on the spot market.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies a 5% shortfall and executes a purchase to cover it.

nodes.task_description: Retire the required number of RECs and generate the compliance report for the state regulator.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully retires the RECs and generates the formal report.
